summary: Iteration 14 testing complete: Push notification features verified. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 push notification testing complete. All backend endpoints verified: /api/push/stats, /api/push/test, /api/push/send_all, /api/push/vapid-key, /api/push/subscribe. Admin Settings tab has Push Notifications section with Test Push button, title/message inputs, Send All button, and subscribed users badge (currently 0). Dashboard has notification enable banner that shows when permission is 'default'. subscribePush in index.js correctly uses matka11_token. Push subscriptions count is 0 because no real user has clicked the enable button yet.
